---
title: "SP KPI Dashboard"
date: today
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    scrolling: true
    sidebar:
        style: docked
        background: light
    nav-buttons: [github]
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
#| include: false
from sp_analysis import load_data, prepare, facet_chart

df = load_data()
```

# Visits

## Row

### Absolute (log scale)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c1_visits'),
    col='c1_visits',
    y_title='Number of Visits',
    title='SP Website Visits by Country',
)
```

## Row

### % Change from first year

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c1_visits', pct=True),
    col='c1_visits_pct',
    y_title='% Change from First Year',
    title='C1 Visits — % Change from First Year',
    pct=True,
)
```

# Users

## Row

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c2_user'),
    col='c2_user',
    y_title='Number of Users',
    title='C2 Users by Country',
)
```

# PDO Deliveries

## Row

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c3_pdoDeliver'),
    col='c3_pdoDeliver',
    y_title='Number of Deliveries',
    title='C3 PDO Deliveries by Country',
)
```

# Events

## Row

### Training Events (C4)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c4_events'),
    col='c4_events',
    y_title='Number of Events',
    title='C4 Events by Country',
)
```

## Row

### All Events (C8)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c8_allEvent'),
    col='c8_allEvent',
    y_title='Number of All Events',
    title='C8 All Events by Country',
)
```

## Row

### Event Attendees (C6)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c6_eAttendees'),
    col='c6_eAttendees',
    y_title='Number of Attendees',
    title='C6 Event Attendees by Country',
)
```

# PDO Stored

## Row

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c10_pdoStored'),
    col='c10_pdoStored',
    y_title='Number of PDO Stored',
    title='C10 PDO Stored by Country',
)
```

# Staff & Funding

## Row

### Total Staff (C13)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c13_staff'),
    col='c13_staff',
    y_title='Number of Staff',
    title='C13 Staff by Country',
)
```

### Contract Staff (C15)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c15_cstaff'),
    col='c15_cstaff',
    y_title='Number of Contract Staff',
    title='C15 Contract Staff by Country',
)
```

## Row

### National Funds (C14)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c14_nfunds'),
    col='c14_nfunds',
    y_title='National Funds (€)',
    title='C14 National Funds by Country',
)
```

### Contract Funds (C16)

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c16_cfunds'),
    col='c16_cfunds',
    y_title='Contract Funds (€)',
    title='C16 Contract Funds by Country',
)
```

# Publications

## Row

```{python}
facet_chart(
    prepare(df, 'c19_pub'),
    col='c19_pub',
    y_title='Number of Publications',
    title='C19 Publications by Country',
)
```
